name: local-terminal-mcp
description: Local terminal MCP server - gives Claude controlled access to your Windows shell

scripts.prepack: node -e "const f=require('child_process').execSync('git ls-files --others --exclude-standard src/').toString().trim(); if(f.match(/\.(orig|bak|rej|swp)$|_HEAD\.|_BRANCH\.|_LOCAL\.|_REMOTE\./)){console.error('Untracked artifact in src/: '+f);process.exit(1);}"

author: ForgeRift LLC
